creator: rsos+freebsd@mailbox.org
text:
Created attachment 150956
Ranger with non-ascii character filenames

Using py-ranger with non-ascii characters leads to wrong display of these characters (see attachment).

I'm running FreeBSD 10.1/amd64 with the following .login_conf (UTF-8):
# $FreeBSD: release/10.0.0/share/skel/dot.login_conf 77995 2001-06-10 17:08:53Z ache $
#
# see login.conf(5)
#
#me:\
#	:charset=iso-8859-1:\
#	:lang=de_DE.ISO8859-1:

me:\
    :charset=en_GB.UTF-8:\


Thank you for your help!
